title: GoPDF.js
subtitle: This monorepo ships @gopdfjs/* npm packages for local PDF processing in the browser and Node.

local.title: Private by default
local.description: PDF bytes are processed in the browser Worker or on your machine — no upload pipeline required.

npm.title: @gopdfjs/* npm packages
npm.description: Published from this monorepo — engine, adapters, and plugins for browser and Node apps.

browserNode.title: Browser and Node
browserNode.description: createEngine(await createBrowserAdapter()) or createEngine(await createNodeAdapter()) — same Gopdf API.

aiHelp.title: AI & agents
aiHelp.description: Copy-paste guide for LLMs — browser and Node patterns, golden rules, full API index.
